before_problem: The page-9 Limitations paragraph split 'general VLM-grounding preservation claim' as 'general VLM-grounding preserva- / tion claim'.

change_summary.summary: Replaced the long compound phrase 'VLM-grounding preservation claim' with the clause 'claim that VLM grounding is preserved' to remove the targeted page-9 linebreak defect.

observations: The page-9 comparison shows the Limitations paragraph no longer contains the targeted 'general VLM-grounding preserva- / tion claim' split.
The accepted page-9 render reads 'cannot support a general claim that VLM grounding is preserved.'
Limitations and Conclusion remain on page 9, and the page-10 Ethical Considerations and References layout is not displaced.
The final contact sheet remains 11 pages with no obvious float, table, or blank-page regression.
A separate 'preserva-' split remains elsewhere in the paper text for an unrelated MDL-preservation sentence; this round only targeted the page-9 VLM-grounding preservation claim.

verification.command: bash -lc 'if rg -n "Overfull|LaTeX Warning: Label|There were undefined references|Undefined control sequence|multiply-defined|Rerun to get cross-references right|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log; then exit 1; else printf "no blocker matches\n"; fi'

verification.result: ok true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract word count 168
